daily.today_energy: Your intuition is firing on all cylinders today, Scorpio. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your internal GPS right now. Something's shifting beneath the surface, and you're picking up on it before anyone else.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, there's a vibe of authenticity in the air. If you're seeing someone, vulnerability hits different today—the good kind. Single? Stop overthinking and just exist. Your magnetism speaks for itself.
daily.career: Your creative problem-solving is peaked today. That project or situation everyone's been stuck on? You've got the perspective shift it needs. Your voice matters more than you think—use it.
daily.health: Your energy feels grounded but electric. A good day to move your body in ways that feel good, not obligatory. Whether that's a walk, dancing, or stretching—honor what your body's asking for.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about shedding what no longer serves you, Scorpio. Mercury's vibes are pushing you toward clarity and honest conversations. Trust your gut—it's been right before and it's right now.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, vulnerability is your superpower rn. Someone might surprise you with their depth. Don't overthink the signals; sometimes the simplest explanation hits different.
weekly.career: Your creative problem-solving is chef's kiss this week. A project or idea you've been sitting on deserves attention. Low-key confidence moves will get you further than big declarations.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for grounding activities—maybe walks, stretching, or something that connects you to the earth. Pay attention to what makes you feel solid and peaceful, not just productive.
